zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，空头仍占主导
zh.content:
从当前价格表现来看，AVAX/USD最新报6.4432，价格运行于20日均线6.5324下方，整体维持弱势震荡格局。24小时涨幅仅0.22%，反映市场反弹动能有限，短线趋势仍偏空，若无法重新站上均线，后市仍存在进一步回调风险。

技术指标方面，MACD指标处于零轴下方，当前值为-0.00087，显示空头动能尚未完全释放，市场仍处于调整阶段。由于RSI数据缺失，暂时无法判断是否进入超买或超卖区域，但结合均线结构分析，价格持续受压于SMA20之下，说明中期趋势尚未扭转。

关键价位方面，短线支撑首先关注6.41美元区域，该位置也是日内低点附近，一旦跌破，可能进一步下探6.30美元整数关口。上方阻力位则位于6.46美元以及20日均线所在的6.53美元区域，只有有效突破并站稳6.53美元，才能确认短线反弹延续。

交易策略上，稳健型投资者建议暂时观望，等待价格突破6.53美元后再考虑顺势做多。激进交易者可关注6.41-6.46美元区间的突破方向，若跌破支撑可轻仓跟随空头；若放量突破均线压制，则可尝试短线低吸，但需严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a tight consolidation phase around 6.44, showing mild intraday stability after a slight 0.22% uptick. Price action remains constrained between the recent low at 6.4148 and high at 6.4624, indicating low volatility. However, the broader short-term structure leans slightly bearish as price trades below the 20-period SMA at 6.53238, suggesting sellers still maintain marginal control despite temporary equilibrium.

The MACD reading at -0.0008735 reinforces a weak bearish momentum signal, though the magnitude suggests limited directional conviction. With the signal line unavailable, confirmation is incomplete, yet price remaining under the SMA(20) continues to act as a dynamic resistance marker. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold assessment, so momentum interpretation relies heavily on moving average positioning and MACD slope behavior.

Immediate support is defined near the session low at 6.4148, with a psychological buffer around 6.40. A breakdown below this zone could expose deeper support near 6.35, where prior liquidity clusters likely reside. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the 20-SMA around 6.53238, followed by stronger rejection risk near 6.62, aligning with previous intraday highs and short-term supply zones.

Given the compressed range and slight bearish bias, short-term traders may favor range strategies between 6.41 support and 6.53 resistance. Long positions are better considered only on confirmed reclaim of the 6.53 SMA with volume expansion. Conversely, failure to hold 6.41 may justify short exposure toward 6.35. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility and potential false breakouts in current conditions overall market structure remains cautious.
